title: 为什么人工智能热潮导致万物价格上涨
content: The AI boom is driving up prices across the economy. Increased demand for data centers, specialized chips, and energy infrastructure strains supply chains. Tech giants' massive investments in AI capabilities create competition for limited computing resources, labor, and electricity. These cost pressures ripple through hardware, cloud services, and energy markets, ultimately raising prices for businesses and consumers.

title: Transitioning as a Hubber
content: GitHub's remote-first culture, where employees primarily use handles rather than legal names, made transitioning easier for the author than at previous IT jobs that relied on real names. The company covers gender-affirming healthcare benefits including voice training, HRT, and therapy. Remote work eliminates concerns about office attire and public visibility, while asynchronous written communication reduced pressure during voice changes. After updating their name and pronouns internally, colleagues respected the transition without difficulty, offering genuine support.
eventKey: transitioning-hubber
normalizedTitle: transitioning as a hubber

title: AI Is Crossing the Frontier of Human Knowledge | Kevin Weil
content: Former OpenAI CPO Kevin Weil discusses AI's potential to accelerate scientific discovery beyond current human knowledge. He covers advances in reasoning, coding, and autonomous research across mathematics and medicine, plus robotic labs and AI agents. Weil shares lessons from scaling products at Twitter, Instagram, and Facebook, and advises founders on building startups amid rapidly evolving AI capabilities.

title: 分享一些 RAG 工作的排查经验
content: RAG 项目有一个很奇怪的倾向：系统一旦答错，大家首先怀疑的总是模型。 这当然可以理解。模型是整套系统里最显眼的部分，也是最容易替换的部分。换一个模型，输出立刻就会变化；调整一下提示词，当天就能找到几个更好的答案。相比之下，整理文档、检查版本、设计测试，看起来既慢又不够聪明…

title: 花 2 月写了一款软件，结果 claude code router 上线了一模一样的功能
content: The developer spent two months building an LLMAdmin UI tool combining Portkey's open-source gateway with a local interface to solve common AI agent workflow problems: switching models mid-session, handling 429 rate limits, seamlessly moving across providers when tokens deplete, and selecting different intelligence levels per task step. Before release, Claude Code Router launched identical desktop functionality. The project is now open-sourced at github.com/leaf-llm/llmadmin-ui for community discussion.

title: Evaluating performance and efficiency of the GitHub Copilot agentic harness across models and tasks
content: GitHub's agentic harness, shared across Copilot CLI, app, and code review, orchestrates tools and context for AI-powered development. Benchmarked against model-vendor harnesses (Claude Code, Codex CLI) using identical models and tasks, Copilot achieves comparable task-completion rates while consuming fewer tokens. Tests covered SWE-bench, TerminalBench, and internal benchmarks across GPT and Claude models. The harness supports 20+ models with auto-selection, enabling developers to balance cost and capability. Multi-model architecture enables unique features like cross-model critique for quality improvement.
eventKey: evaluating-performance-efficiency-github-copilot-agentic
normalizedTitle: evaluating performance and efficiency of the github copilot agentic harness across models and tasks

title: Anthropic 指控阿里巴巴实施大规模 AI 模型蒸馏攻击
content: Anthropic accused Alibaba of conducting its largest-known model distillation attack. In a letter to a U.S. Senate committee, the AI company stated that Alibaba-linked operators used approximately 25,000 fraudulent accounts to interact with Anthropic models 28.8 million times between April 22 and June 5. Anthropic described the Chinese tech company's actions as "brazen" and "unlawful" attempts to steal AI capabilities.
eventKey: anthropic-指控阿里巴巴实施大规模-模型蒸馏攻击

title: Claude Code 升级为 Claude Tag，定位为更主动、擅长团队协作的企业协作工具
content: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, an enterprise collaboration tool upgrading Claude Code with proactive, team-focused AI assistance. Unlike personal AI assistants, it operates as a shared team member with continuous memory, shared context, proactive interventions, and asynchronous task execution. Currently paired with Opus 4.8 and available in Slack beta for Enterprise and Team users, it replaces the previous Slack integration within 30 days, with broader platform expansion planned.

title: OpenAI 再次升级 GPT-5.5 Instant AI：更具洞察力，购物推荐更实用
content: OpenAI upgraded its GPT-5.5 Instant model on June 25. The update improves intent understanding, reliability on complex tasks, and output quality with more natural, readable, and structured responses. It reduces verbose lists, stabilizes performance under complex constraints, and enhances shopping and local recommendations. The model is available to paying users immediately and free users starting June 26.

title: 苹果提高 Mac、iPad 等产品价格，以应对内存短缺
content: Apple raised prices for Mac and iPad products due to severe memory shortages caused by AI data center expansion. MacBook models increased from 4,599–13,499 yuan to 5,499–15,999 yuan; iPad Pro and Air rose from 8,999 and 4,799 yuan to 10,799 and 5,999 yuan respectively. The company cited unprecedented component cost increases. Apple's stock fell over 5%, its largest drop in more than a year. iPhone prices remained unchanged.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 界面
